headline: Can Healthy Revenue Growth Boost Ubiquiti's Q3 Earnings?
summary: UI heads into fiscal Q3 earnings with rising Enterprise demand and projected revenue growth after beating estimates for four straight quarters.

headline: Arista Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Healthy Y/Y Revenue Growth
summary: ANET posts Q1 surge as AI-driven demand lifts revenues 35% and beats estimates, with strong growth across cloud, enterprise and services.

headline: Qorvo Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates Despite Lower Revenue Growth
summary: QRVO beats Q4 estimates despite weak smartphone demand, as stronger margins, cost control and product mix lift profitability.
